_meta.description: Locked Phase 0 config values for Phase 1 handoff. Large arrays and diagnostics excluded. All listed values are frozen and must not be changed without human authorization and a new CHECKPOINT_LOG entry.

preprocessing.COORD_INTERP_RULE: gcamp_trace_array_zscore_only: ΔQ_significant → report as tentative state-conditional fluorescence structure; behavioral confound unresolved until CePNEM residual replication.

hypothesis.PRIMARY_HYPOTHESIS_TEXT: The top 50 stable off-synaptic ΔQ entries in gcamp_trace_array_zscore (globally z-scored GCaMP calcium fluorescence; fallback coordinate — CePNEM residuals unavailable) — classified as off-connectome against both raw Cook/Witvliet connectome support and Creamer A_C support — are enriched for non-synaptic signaling annotations (neuropeptide connectome from Ripoll-Sánchez et al. 2023 or Randi unc-31-sensitive relationships from Randi et al. 2023), using simple permutation null restricted to the 61-neuron identified subgraph. Estimation uses pooled-hierarchical stability selection across all contributing NeuroPAL animals. Non-roaming is the primary regime (adequate power); roaming is exploratory (pooled, fragile). Covariance estimates represent time-averaged effective structure under confirmed within-recording drift (NONSTATIONARITY_FRACTION=1.0).

unresolved_deviations.DEV_003: NONSTATIONARITY_FRACTION=1.0; temporal covariance drift confirmed real; leading cause photobleaching; blocks real-data inference
unresolved_deviations.DEV_004: COORD_PRIMARY=gcamp_trace_array_zscore; CePNEM residuals unavailable; behavioral confounds unresolved; blocks real-data inference
unresolved_deviations.DEV_005: Stage 7 not completed; OUTLIER_ANIMALS=[]; CV fold assignments not generated; blocks real-data inference
